hero.title: Your Premium Chauffeur Service in Paris
hero.subtitle: Experience luxury private car service across Paris and all of France. Professional chauffeurs, premium vehicles, and unmatched punctuality for airport transfers, business travel, and bespoke journeys.

airportTransfer.name: Airport Transfer
airportTransfer.description: Seamless airport transfers to and from Paris Charles de Gaulle (CDG), Orly, and Le Bourget. Fixed pricing, flight tracking, and meet-and-greet service included.

airportTransfer.detailSubtitle: Reliable, luxury airport transfers with professional chauffeurs
airportTransfer.detailDescription: Arrive in Paris or depart with complete peace of mind. Our airport transfer service covers all major Paris airports including Charles de Gaulle, Orly, Le Bourget, and Beauvais. Your professional chauffeur monitors your flight in real time, waits at arrivals with a name sign, and assists with all luggage. Enjoy fixed pricing with no surprise charges, even if your flight is delayed.

hourly.detailSubtitle: A dedicated private chauffeur at your disposal, by the hour
hourly.detailDescription: Whether you have back-to-back business meetings, a day of luxury shopping, or want to explore Paris at your own pace, our hourly chauffeur service puts a professional driver and premium vehicle entirely at your disposal. Make unlimited stops, change your itinerary on the fly, and enjoy the freedom of a personal driver without the hassle of parking or navigation.

client1.name: Sophie Laurent

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our premium chauffeur service in Paris.

booking.q1: How do I book a chauffeur service with Hyppo Mobile?
booking.a1: You can book directly through our website by selecting your service type, choosing a vehicle, and entering your travel details. You will receive an instant confirmation by email. Alternatively, you can call us or send a WhatsApp message for personalized assistance.
booking.q2: How far in advance should I book my private car service?
booking.a2: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance to guarantee vehicle availability, especially for premium and on-demand vehicles. However, we do accommodate last-minute bookings when possible, so do not hesitate to contact us even on short notice.
booking.q3: Can I modify my booking after confirmation?
booking.a3: Yes, you can modify your booking up to 6 hours before the scheduled pickup time at no extra charge. Changes to vehicle type or significant route alterations may affect pricing. Please contact our support team to make any changes.

pricing.q1: How is the pricing calculated for airport transfers?
pricing.a1: Airport transfer pricing is fixed and based on the vehicle category. The price covers door-to-door service between any Paris address and the airport, including 60 minutes of free waiting time, flight tracking, meet-and-greet, and luggage assistance. There are no hidden fees or surge charges.
pricing.q2: Are there any additional fees I should know about?
pricing.a2: Our pricing is fully transparent. The quoted price includes the vehicle, chauffeur, fuel, tolls, parking, and waiting time (60 minutes for airports, 15 minutes for other pickups). Additional charges apply only for extended waiting beyond the included allowance or late-night bookings between midnight and 6 AM.
pricing.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.a3: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), bank transfers for corporate accounts, and cash payments. Payment is processed securely after your ride is completed. Corporate clients can arrange monthly invoicing.

services.q1: Do you provide airport meet-and-greet service?
services.a1: Yes, for all airport transfers your chauffeur will be waiting in the arrivals hall holding a sign with your name. They will assist you with your luggage and escort you to your vehicle. We track your flight in real time, so the pickup time adjusts automatically if your flight is early or delayed.
services.q2: Can I hire a chauffeur for a full day or multi-day trip?
services.a2: Absolutely. Our hourly chauffeur service is perfect for full-day hire, and we offer special rates for multi-day bookings. Whether you need a chauffeur for a day of business meetings, a weekend getaway to Champagne, or a week-long tour, we will create a custom package for you.
services.q3: Do you offer wedding car hire with a chauffeur?
services.a3: Yes, we specialize in luxury wedding transportation. Choose from our premium fleet including the Rolls-Royce Phantom and Bentley Flying Spur. We provide vehicle decoration, a uniformed chauffeur, and coordination with your wedding planner to ensure every detail is perfect.

vehicles.q1: What vehicles are available in your fleet?
vehicles.a1: Our fleet includes the Mercedes-Benz E-Class (Business Class), Mercedes V-Class (Van XL for groups), Mercedes S-Class (First Class), Mercedes-Maybach, VIP Van, Mercedes Sprinter (up to 12 passengers), Rolls-Royce Phantom, Bentley Flying Spur, and Range Rover Autobiography.
vehicles.q2: Can I request a specific vehicle for my booking?
vehicles.a2: Yes, you select your preferred vehicle during the booking process. Standard fleet vehicles (Business Class, Van XL, First Class) are available with instant pricing. Premium on-demand vehicles (Maybach, Rolls-Royce, Bentley, Range Rover) require a quote and are subject to availability.
vehicles.q3: Are child seats available in your vehicles?
vehicles.a3: Yes, we provide child seats and booster seats at no additional charge. Please indicate the number and ages of children when making your booking so we can install the appropriate safety seats in advance. We carry infant seats, child seats, and booster seats.

cancellation.a1: Cancellations made more than 24 hours before the scheduled pickup are fully refundable. Cancellations between 12 and 24 hours before pickup incur a 50% charge. Cancellations less than 12 hours before pickup or no-shows are charged in full. On-demand vehicles may have different terms.
cancellation.q2: What happens if my flight is cancelled or significantly delayed?
cancellation.a2: Since we track all flights in real time, we automatically adjust your pickup time for delays. If your flight is cancelled, please notify us as soon as possible and we will either reschedule your transfer at no extra charge or provide a full refund.
cancellation.q3: Can I get a refund if I need to shorten my hourly booking?
cancellation.a3: If you end your hourly booking earlier than planned, you will be charged for the minimum booking time (2 hours) or the actual time used, whichever is greater. Unused time beyond the minimum is not charged. Please note this applies only to hourly service bookings.

about.title: About Hyppo Mobile
about.subtitle: Discover the story behind Paris's trusted premium chauffeur service.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Hyppo Mobile was founded with a clear vision: to redefine private transportation in Paris by combining the highest standards of luxury, reliability, and personalized service. What started as a small fleet of premium vehicles has grown into one of the most trusted chauffeur services in France.
story.p2: Over the past decade, we have completed more than 5,000 rides for discerning travelers, corporate executives, diplomats, and celebrities who demand nothing less than excellence. Our commitment to punctuality, discretion, and comfort has earned us a 98% client satisfaction rate.
story.p3: Today, our fleet includes everything from the elegant Mercedes-Benz E-Class to the prestigious Rolls-Royce Phantom, ensuring we have the perfect vehicle for every occasion. Every journey with Hyppo Mobile is an experience crafted around your needs.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To deliver an unparalleled private car experience that combines luxury, safety, and reliability. We strive to make every journey memorable, whether it is a five-minute airport pickup or a week-long tour across France.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We maintain the highest standards in every aspect of our service, from vehicle maintenance to chauffeur training.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Punctuality is non-negotiable. We track flights, monitor traffic, and always arrive early.

discretion.title: Discretion
discretion.description: Your privacy is paramount. Our chauffeurs are trained in confidentiality and professional conduct.

personalization.title: Personalization
personalization.description: Every client is unique. We tailor our service to your specific preferences and requirements.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Our chauffeurs are the heart of Hyppo Mobile. Each driver is carefully selected through a rigorous process that evaluates driving skill, local knowledge, language proficiency, and hospitality. All chauffeurs hold professional VTC licenses and undergo regular training in safety, etiquette, and customer service.

fleet.title: Our Premium Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Explore our collection of luxury vehicles, each meticulously maintained and equipped to deliver an exceptional private car experience in Paris and beyond.
fleet.regularDescription: Our core fleet of premium vehicles with transparent, fixed pricing for airport transfers and hourly hire.
fleet.onDemandDescription: Exclusive ultra-luxury vehicles available by request. Contact us for custom pricing and availability.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: These terms and conditions govern your use of Hyppo Mobile chauffeur services. By booking with us, you agree to the following terms.

section1.title: 1. Booking and Confirmation
section1.content: All bookings are subject to vehicle availability. A booking is confirmed only when you receive a written confirmation by email. We reserve the right to assign an equivalent or superior vehicle if the requested vehicle is unavailable. Bookings can be made through our website, by phone, or via email.

section2.title: 2. Pricing and Payment
section2.content: Prices for standard vehicles and airport transfers are fixed at the time of booking. Hourly rates are charged per hour with a minimum of 2 hours. Custom journey quotes are valid for 7 days from issue. Payment is due upon completion of service unless alternative arrangements have been made for corporate accounts. We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, bank transfer, and cash.

section3.title: 3. Cancellation Policy
section3.content: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the scheduled pickup time. Cancellations between 12 and 24 hours before pickup incur a 50% charge. Cancellations less than 12 hours before pickup or no-shows are charged at the full rate. On-demand and premium vehicles may have specific cancellation terms provided at the time of booking.

section4.title: 4. Waiting Time
section4.content: For airport transfers, 60 minutes of free waiting time is included from the actual flight landing time. For all other pickups, 15 minutes of free waiting time is included from the scheduled pickup time. Additional waiting is charged at a rate communicated at the time of booking.

section5.title: 5. Passenger Responsibilities
section5.content: Passengers must behave in a safe and respectful manner. Smoking is strictly prohibited in all vehicles. The passenger is liable for any damage caused to the vehicle interior, including stains, burns, or breakages. Hyppo Mobile reserves the right to terminate a journey if passenger behavior endangers safety.

section6.title: 6. Liability
section6.content: Hyppo Mobile carries comprehensive professional liability and passenger insurance as required by French law for VTC operators. Our liability for delays caused by traffic, road closures, or force majeure events is limited to a goodwill gesture at our discretion. We are not responsible for items left in vehicles, though we will make reasonable efforts to recover and return them.

section7.title: 7. Data Protection
section7.content: We collect and process personal data in accordance with the European General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and French data protection law. For full details, please refer to our Privacy Policy.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Hyppo Mobile is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect information you provide when booking a service, including your name, email address, phone number, pickup and drop-off locations, travel dates, and payment information. We also collect technical data such as your IP address, browser type, and device information when you visit our website.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: Your personal information is used to process and fulfill your bookings, communicate booking confirmations and updates, provide customer support, send marketing communications (only with your consent), improve our services and website experience, and comply with legal obligations.

section3.title: 3. Data Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We share your information only with our chauffeurs (name and pickup details for service delivery), payment processors (for secure transaction processing), and legal authorities (when required by law). All third-party partners are bound by data protection agreements.

section4.title: 4. Data Retention
section4.content: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. Booking records are kept for 5 years in accordance with French commercial law. Marketing consent records are maintained until you withdraw consent. You can request deletion of your data at any time.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access your personal data, rectify inaccurate data, request erasure of your data, restrict processing, data portability, object to processing, and withdraw consent. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@hyppomobile.com.

section6.title: 6. Cookies
section6.content: Our website uses cookies to ensure functionality, analyze traffic, and personalize your experience. Essential cookies are required for the website to function. Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors use our site. Marketing cookies are used only with your explicit consent. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

section7.title: 7. Contact
section7.content: For any questions about this privacy policy or your personal data, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@hyppomobile.com or write to Hyppo Mobile, 123 Avenue des Champs-Elysees, 75008 Paris, France.
